level.setting: The Whispering Catacombs, a dark, crumbling subterranean maze filled with skeletal echoes.

enemy.name: Frost-Bound Sentry
enemy.weakness: Direct flame damage from Cinder Staff

pickup.name: Ember Oil
pickup.effect: Increases fire damage dealt by 20%

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentry shatters the ice door blocking the path to the inner sanctum

enemy.name: Ice-Wreathed Shade
enemy.weakness: Fire damage enhanced by Ember Oil

pickup.name: Ancient Sunstone
pickup.effect: Casts a bright light that reveals hidden mechanisms

encounters.trigger: The shade's death unlocks the mechanism to the sealed crypt gate

enemy.name: Hoarfrost Knight
enemy.weakness: Exposure to the concentrated light of the Ancient Sunstone

pickup.name: Void-Burning Catalyst
pickup.effect: Allows fire attacks to pierce magical shields

encounters.trigger: Destroying the knight triggers the massive stone doors to the Boss Chamber to swing open

boss.name: The Eternal Winter Lich
boss.weakness: The destructive power of the Void-Burning Catalyst
boss.victory_condition: Reduce the Lich's health to zero while its barrier is disabled by the catalyst

level.objective: Purge the Catacombs of the encroaching frost magic
level.reward: The Eternal Flame Orb, a legendary artifact

pickup.name: Honey Dew Droplet
pickup.effect: Heals 5 HP

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sprout unlocks the path to the Whispering Creek.

pickup.name: Golden Acorn
pickup.effect: Boosts attack damage

encounters.trigger: Calming the mud-imp reveals the hidden tunnel to the Sunken Grove.

pickup.name: Crystalized Moonbeam
pickup.effect: Stuns the boss for 3 seconds

encounters.trigger: Clearing the grove allows the player to enter the Elder Oak sanctum for the boss fight.

boss.name: The Prancing Treant
boss.victory_condition: Calm the Treant to make it dance

level.objective: Stop the Prancing Treant from snoring so loudly that it wakes the nearby sleepy dragons.
level.reward: An eternal supply of magical animal treats

encounters.hazard: Ethereal gloom that drains health over time

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Water
pickup.effect: Imbues blade with holy light, dealing extra damage to undead

encounters.trigger: Defeating the construct clears the mist, revealing the door to the Sanctuary.

encounters.hazard: Falling debris from the crumbling ceiling

pickup.name: Sun-Etched Amulet
pickup.effect: Protects against dark magic and highlights weak points

encounters.trigger: The knight drops a key upon death that unlocks the Altar of Souls.

encounters.hazard: Sacrificial flames that block movement paths

pickup.name: Fragment of the First Light
pickup.effect: Required to break the shield of the final boss

encounters.trigger: Claiming the fragment causes the cathedral roof to collapse, summoning the boss.

boss.name: Malakor the Defiler
boss.victory_condition: Use the fragment to shatter his shield, then strike with the Blessed Claymore

level.objective: Purify the desecrated cathedral by defeating Malakor.

enemy.name: Void Sentinel
enemy.weakness: Staff of Prismatic Deception (direct light resonance)

pickup.name: Lens of True Sight
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden platforms and enemy weak points

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel causes the floor to vanish, dropping the player into the Archive Basement.

enemy.name: Living Manuscript
enemy.weakness: Lens of True Sight (reveals paper seams for massive critical hits)

encounters.hazard: Ensnaring ink pools that slow movement

pickup.name: Vial of Starlight Ink
pickup.effect: Imbues illusion spells with holy luminescence

encounters.trigger: When the Manuscript shreds, the ink forms a doorway leading to the Sanctum of the Final Page.

encounters.location: The Sanctum of the Final Page

enemy.name: Ink-Blot Horror
enemy.weakness: Vial of Starlight Ink (burns through the creature's outer shell)

encounters.hazard: Weight of knowledge (constant passive health drain)

pickup.name: Chime of Absolute Silence
pickup.effect: Stuns enemies and nullifies boss armor

encounters.trigger: Upon absorbing the Horror's last echo, the Chime of Absolute Silence vibrates, signaling the Boss to descend.

boss.name: The Grand Archivist
boss.victory_condition: Use the Chime to break the Archivist's immunity shield, then land a killing blow with the Staff.

level.objective: Retrieve the Forbidden Tome of Illusions from the Grand Archivist.
level.reward: The Archivist's Mantle (Grants permanent invisibility when standing still).

level.setting: An ancient, sun-drenched forest grove where time stands still

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Petal
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to poison effects

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sprite reveals the hidden path to the Crystal Pond

pickup.name: Essence of Clarity
pickup.effect: Allows the user to see through illusions

encounters.trigger: Cleansing the pond parts the mist leading to the Ancient Altar

pickup.name: Heart of the Grove
pickup.effect: Stabilizes the wild magic of the boss

encounters.trigger: Subduing the guardian unlocks the seal to the Great Tree heart

boss.name: The Corrupted Dryad
boss.victory_condition: Use the Heart of the Grove to purify the Dryad's connection to the corrupted roots

level.objective: Restore peace to the ancient grove by purifying the Corrupted Dryad
level.reward: The title of Grove Keeper and a permanent health boost

level.setting: shattered floating citadel of a mad wizard

pickup.name: aetheric essence vial
pickup.effect: increases movement speed and agility for 30 seconds

encounters.trigger: defeating the phantom stabilizes the drawbridge allowing access to the central spire

encounters.hazard: exploding scrolls that ignite upon contact

pickup.name: sealed obsidian locket
pickup.effect: creates a necrotic pulse when crushed

encounters.trigger: shattering the golem releases the energy needed to unlock the sanctum gates

pickup.name: star-forged medallion
pickup.effect: renders the wielder invulnerable to magical attacks for 10 seconds

encounters.trigger: killing the shadow berserker summons the dungeon lord from the rift

boss.name: archmage malakor
boss.victory_condition: strip the mage of his magical defenses using the medallion and deliver a final axe blow

level.objective: breach the floating citadel and terminate the source of the chaotic rifts
level.reward: ascension to the rank of warlord and mastery over void-forged equipment

level.setting: a decaying, fog-shrouded cemetery surrounding a ruined cathedral

pickup.name: Soul-Infused Lantern
pickup.effect: illuminates hidden ethereal enemies and weakens ghosts

encounters.trigger: killing the gravekeeper unlocks the gate to the Mausoleum

pickup.name: Cursed Silver Bell
pickup.effect: emits a frequency that shatters physical barriers protecting demonic entities

encounters.trigger: the shrieker's death collapses a wall revealing the path to the Altar

pickup.name: Shadowed Amulet
pickup.effect: absorbs massive amounts of dark energy

encounters.trigger: defeating the monk dispels the wards surrounding the cathedral's inner sanctum

boss.name: Lich King of the Void
boss.victory_condition: use the Shadowed Amulet to drain the boss's shield before delivering a killing blow with the scythe

level.objective: infiltrate the cathedral and banish the Lich King to restore balance to the cemetery
level.reward: control over the spirits of the fallen cemetery soldiers

level.setting: The Whispering Wastes, a desolate, ash-covered tundra where the sun never rises.

encounters.hazard: Freezing gale winds that drain stamina over time.

pickup.name: Ethereal Oil
pickup.effect: Coats arrows to deal magical damage against incorporeal beings.

encounters.trigger: Upon defeating the stalker, the corpse dissolves, revealing a path to the Silent Monolith.

encounters.hazard: Floors that crumble and collapse into a void beneath.

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Shard
pickup.effect: Emits a blinding light that stuns darkness-aligned entities.

encounters.trigger: The death of the specter shatters the monolith, opening the gate to the Shadow Sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Persistent hallucinations that invert movement controls.

pickup.name: Heart of the Void
pickup.effect: A pulsating core required to suppress the boss's regenerative shield.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the guardian causes it to drop the key to the Inner Chamber.

boss.name: Malakor the Soul-Eater
boss.victory_condition: Use the Heart of the Void to disable his invulnerability, then strike him with the Obsidian Longbow.

level.objective: Purify the desolate wastes by slaying Malakor and breaking the eternal twilight.
level.reward: The Ranger's Zenith Bow and the Title of Dawn-Bringer.

level.setting: Derelict mining station orbiting a black hole

pickup.name: Overclock Module
pickup.effect: Increases Plasma Cutter damage output by 50%

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers the localized power grid failure, unlocking the maintenance hatch to the Engineering Bay.

pickup.name: Magnetic Anchor
pickup.effect: Stabilizes movement in zero-gravity and can be used to bind mechanical foes

encounters.trigger: Defeating the parasite initiates the station's self-destruct sequence countdown, revealing the path to the bridge.

pickup.name: Override Keycard
pickup.effect: Required to disable the final boss's shielding system

encounters.trigger: Bypassing the sentry allows access to the central server core, activating the boss.

boss.name: The Station AI Construct
boss.weakness: Override Keycard inserted into the central core
boss.victory_condition: Disable shields with the Override Keycard, then defeat the core with concentrated Plasma Cutter fire

level.objective: Escape the station before it is swallowed by the black hole.
level.reward: Classified prototype blueprints and the rank of Master Engineer

level.setting: An abandoned orbital research station drifting in the void of a dead star system

encounters.hazard: Localized time loops causing gravity shifts

pickup.name: Stasis Battery
pickup.effect: Freezes enemies in place for 3 seconds

encounters.trigger: Opening the main cargo seal reveals the path to the Engineering Deck

pickup.name: Quantum Frequency Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks encrypted blast doors and disrupts enemy shielding

encounters.trigger: Uploading the data logs from the drone initiates the sequence to the Central Core

encounters.hazard: Radiation leaks damaging the player over time

pickup.name: Chronos Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Enhances time-dilation abilities for the final confrontation

encounters.trigger: Entering the code generated by the Sentinel unlocks the path to the Boss Room

boss.name: Aethelgard, Time-Devourer
boss.victory_condition: Use the Chronos Core Fragment to stabilize the timeline and overload the boss's internal reactor

level.objective: Restore stability to the orbital station by purging the corrupted time entities
level.reward: The Chronomancer's Relic: An artifact that grants mastery over short-range teleports

level.setting: The burning engine room of a derelict star-dreadnought, gravity flickering constantly.

encounters.hazard: Gravity inversion zones causing fall damage

pickup.name: Plasma Capacitor
pickup.effect: Increases elemental conductivity

encounters.trigger: Debris clearance activates the main ventilation shaft

encounters.hazard: Sweltering heat plumes reducing health over time

pickup.name: Phase-Shifter Core
pickup.effect: Allows short-range teleportation

encounters.trigger: Sentinel destruction unlocks the Reactor Core bulkhead

pickup.name: Stabilization Field Generator
pickup.effect: Neutralizes unstable energy fields

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Marauder overloads the stabilization locks, summoning the Core Overseer

boss.name: Core Overseer
boss.victory_condition: Disable the Overseer's shielding with the generator and land a critical strike with the gauntlets

level.objective: Shut down the reactor before the ship implodes

level.setting: An abandoned orbital research station drifting near a dying nebula

pickup.name: Magnetic Polarizer Module
pickup.effect: Allows interaction with magnetic locking mechanisms and deals extra damage to metallic enemies

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the bay door reveals a pathway to the Data Core

pickup.name: Stabilized Plasma Battery
pickup.effect: Overcharges mechanical devices and weapon circuitry

encounters.trigger: Downloading station logs triggers a silent alarm that unlocks the Bridge

pickup.name: Overclocking Controller Chip
pickup.effect: Necessary for bypassing high-level security locks on the boss door

encounters.trigger: Destroying the turret initiates the lockdown override for the Commander's Quarters

boss.name: Nebula-Infused A.I. Core
boss.victory_condition: Successfully insert the Overclocking Controller Chip into the boss's central port to initiate a system purge

level.objective: Uncover the cause of the station's silence and secure the experimental drive

level.setting: A decaying, abandoned lunar research station infested with cybernetic horrors

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Can freeze mechanical joints

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the airlock releases the pressure seal that blocked the path to the Server Room.

pickup.name: Master Override Keycard
pickup.effect: Unlocks the central reactor core blast doors

encounters.trigger: Downloading the decryption key triggers a facility-wide alarm, unlocking the blast doors to the Reactor Core.

encounters.hazard: Radiation leakage zones reducing movement speed

pickup.name: Reactor Stabilizer Core
pickup.effect: Essential component for sabotaging the boss

encounters.trigger: Eliminating the Sentinel allows the player to bypass the containment field and face the Core Guardian.

boss.name: Core Guardian AI
boss.victory_condition: Successfully insert the Reactor Stabilizer Core while the boss is stunned.

level.objective: Sabotage the station's reactor before it initiates a planet-wide containment wipe.
level.reward: The 'Umbral Cloak' upgrade, granting permanent invisibility while stationary.

level.setting: An abandoned, overgrown bio-engineering research space station orbiting a dying star.

pickup.name: Synthetic Enzyme Catalyst
pickup.effect: Enhances chemical reaction potency

encounters.trigger: Defeating the droid unlocks the blast doors to the Laboratory Corridor.

enemy.name: Stalking Shadow Crawler
enemy.weakness: Enhanced Acid Vials (requires Synthetic Enzyme Catalyst)

pickup.name: Ignition Fuse
pickup.effect: Allows for combustion-based alchemy

encounters.trigger: Scanning the crawler's remains reveals the access code to the Central Greenhouse.

encounters.hazard: Spore clouds that reduce player movement speed

pickup.name: Obsidian Flask
pickup.effect: Protects against thermal shock, vital for the final concoction

encounters.trigger: Destroying the flora triggers the alarm, opening the way to the Core Reactor boss arena.

boss.name: The Symbiotic Hive Mind
boss.victory_condition: Combine the Ignition Fuse and Synthetic Enzyme Catalyst within the Obsidian Flask to dissolve the boss's core shield.

level.objective: Purge the station of the parasitic bio-growth to prevent the infection from reaching Earth.
level.reward: Ancient Alchemical Codex and Experimental Transmutation Tech

encounters.hazard: Floating popcorn clouds that obscure vision

pickup.name: Sticky Gel Pack
pickup.effect: Immobilizes mechanical enemies temporarily

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Bumper-Bot triggers the activation of the gravity lift to the Laser Tag Arena

encounters.hazard: Lasers that tickle instead of burn

pickup.name: Holographic Decoy
pickup.effect: Distracts enemies, allowing for a stealth attack

encounters.trigger: Smashing the Glitter Drone opens the hatch leading to the Cosmic Merry-Go-Round

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Disables boss's primary shield

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Space Clown Android signals the boss to descend from the Big Top Control Room

boss.name: Ringmaster Gear-Head
boss.victory_condition: Use the Master Override Key to deactivate his shield and finish him with the Plasma Dagger

level.objective: Retrieve the stolen Stardust Tickets from the Ringmaster

level.setting: A floating, glass-domed biodome orbiting a dying star, filled with levitating flora and crystalline structures.

enemy.name: Phase-Shifting Drone
enemy.weakness: Direct impact from the Obsidian Seismic Staff

encounters.hazard: Gravity anomalies that invert controls periodically

pickup.name: Resonating Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Vibrates at a frequency that shatters crystalline armor

encounters.trigger: Upon defeating the drone, the glass ceiling cracks, alerting the automated sentries in the lower atrium.

encounters.hazard: Toxic pollen spores that drain health over time

pickup.name: Stasis Catalyst Vial
pickup.effect: Freezes bio-mechanical enemies in their tracks

encounters.trigger: After the husk collapses, it releases a data uplink that unlocks the sealed bulkhead leading to the Core Chamber.

encounters.hazard: Unstable flooring that crumbles away as you move

pickup.name: Singularity Core
pickup.effect: Temporarily manipulates local gravity to shield the player

encounters.trigger: The death of the Sentinel triggers the final containment breach, summoning the Overseer.

boss.name: Stellar Overseer
boss.victory_condition: Overload the boss's containment field using the Singularity Core while it is exposed

level.objective: Deactivate the station's atmospheric stabilizers to prevent the star from incinerating the sector.
level.reward: The ability to transmute matter into stardust currency.
